title: cymbidium pedicellatum
intro: Cymbidium pedicellatum, also known as the alpine cymbidium or rock orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbidium pedicellatum include its ability to help reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
